StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(mi_idx.info) AS rating, MIN(t.title) AS movie_title FROM job.info_type AS it, job.keyword AS k, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.title AS t WHERE it.info ='rating' AND k.keyword LIKE '%sequel%' AND mi_idx.info > '2.0' AND t.production_year > 1990 AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND k.id = mk.keyword_id AND it.id = mi_idx.info_type_id
